{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320120456EDEAFFDE0385407CACB4"}"},"total":8001},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7272467127839277860","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的很喜欢，虽然前面几张有种网文套路的感觉确实有些劝退，但真的熬过去了，轻松有趣的风格是真的，别说什么修仙没写什么残酷之类的，一部主打幽默诙谐的去写那些真的，就像是拿素晴和re0作比较一样，至于轻松幽默的风格能不能接受人各有异，反正我是超级喜欢了（仅个人看法，不喜勿喷）
作者大大加油！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1693254458,"group_id":"7182498594325269508","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"只是把自己想的写下来","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1L6WDnFGfgUDnSlVR8P4WU=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/57e5e6baf61d4a50bccb965b79563904~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776537459&x-signature=P%2BinoUi7oWj0ejcD%2B74dPjJzyXE%3D","user_id":"703336322697583","user_name":"浮梦新"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"703336322697583","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7182498594325269508","book_info":{"abstract":"【沙雕】+【轻松】+【卡bug】+【薅羊毛】+【脑洞】
方尘刚穿越异世，就知道自己刚和被退婚的气运之子约了生死斗，正在瑟瑟发抖。
系统觉醒，以为救星来了。
结果系统第一个任务竟是让方尘提升修为，全力发挥，激发气运之子的潜力，最后死在生死斗里。
面对两种都是死的选择，方尘选择先给气运之子送功法和丹药。
结果，送完之后，方尘就发现自己立刻学会了刚送出的功法……
这一刻，方尘的眼睛立刻亮了起来！
【简介无力，请移步正文】
【书友评价：作者开头五章写得不行，熬过就好了！】
